face.structure: sharp-featured with high cheekbones and a slightly pointed chin, projecting a sense of acute awareness

eyes.shape: narrow almond-shaped with a slight upward tilt
eyes.color: piercing dark brown with lighter golden flecks
details: high contrast with sharp highlights near the inner corners
thin, dark eyebrows angled to enhance a calculating gaze

face.expression: subtly guarded, with a hint of bemusement around the lips

skin.undertone: faint greenish-gold that adds depth and complexity
skin.texture: smooth with a hint of natural sheen, reflecting light minimally
skin.rendering_notes: emphasize a matte finish to highlight facial features effectively

hair.color: deep black with subtle dark blue highlights
hair.style: neatly styled with a side part and layered strands
hair.flow: straight and sleek, with strands occasionally drifting over the forehead
details: fringe slightly tousled for a casual look
lightly textured ends that soften the overall appearance

character.aura: a quiet confidence underscoring a sense of inner depth and complexity

outfit.base: a sleek, modern jacket with minimalist design
outfit.design: clean lines with subtle geometric patterns in dark blue tones
details: silver zipper running asymmetrically across the chest
outfit.fit: tailored but comfortable, allowing free movement without excess material

composition.framing: medium shot focusing from the waist up to capture intensity
composition.pose: standing with one hand casually in a pocket, the other slightly raised as if poised to make a point
composition.gesture: tilted head, eyes locked forward, projecting engagement and subtle challenge

background.color_palette: slate grey with hints of neon blues and yellows
background.details: blurry lights suggesting a vibrant and bustling metropolis
background.rules: avoid excessive detail to maintain the focus on the character while reinforcing the urban strategist theme
